creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #10)

Thanks. 

Can we add links to the following? 

uefi(8)
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=uefi&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>

UEFI - FreeBSD Wiki
<https://wiki.freebsd.org/UEFI>

----

loader.efi(8) is somewhat vague, compared to uefi(8) (and neither page mentions the other; see also bug 265834). 

It will be good to exemplify at least:

    /EFI/BOOT/BOOTX64.EFI

– or (lowercase, maybe preferred): 

    /efi/boot/bootx64.efi
